name: Acquisition and Underwriting
description: Reference Sunfish bundle for deal-flow and underwriting teams: real-estate acquisitions, M&A intake, portfolio underwriting, compliance reviews. Diligence-heavy composition built on CRM lead intake, due-diligence checklists, documents / data rooms, approvals workflows, reporting, and financial-analysis hooks. Complements the property-management and asset-management bundles without duplicating their operational scope.

providerRequirements.purpose: Data-room document storage with access controls and audit.
External-counsel, investor, and sponsor access via SSO / time-bound invites.
Diligence request notifications, evidence upload reminders, approval prompts.

dataOwnership: Tenant-owned. Deal records, diligence checklists, evidence, approval decisions, and data-room access logs exportable for investor reporting and audit retention.
complianceNotes: Regulatory regimes vary heavily by deal type: SEC / FINRA / state-specific for securities transactions, GLBA / privacy for consumer data rooms, sector-specific (healthcare, utilities) for compliance reviews. Data-residency and retention expressed as bundle configuration; lite mode is intentionally not supported because data-room and audit-trail requirements exceed what a local-first deployment can guarantee.
